decisions.reasoning: Calyrex-Ice is significantly slower than Urshifu-RS and takes heavy chip damage from its STAB moves. Switching to Flutter Mane provides an immunity to Urshifu's Fighting-type moves and threatens a super-effective response, forcing the opponent to pivot or risk losing momentum.
Moonblast is a guaranteed OHKO on Urshifu-Rapid-Strike, and I outspeed it. There is no reason to switch when a clean KO is available.
I outspeed Tornadus-Therian and deal significant damage (up to 94.2%), putting it in range for a KO next turn while taking minimal damage in return.
I outspeed Tornadus-Therian and Moonblast is a guaranteed 2HKO, which is sufficient to secure the KO this turn or next while maintaining offensive pressure.
The opponent's Tornadus-Therian is at 11% HP, well within the range for Moonblast to secure a KO this turn, preventing any further chip damage or momentum.

Flutter Mane is at 28% and will be OHKOed by Rillaboom's Wood Hammer or Drum Beating. Switching to Incineroar provides a safe pivot that resists Rillaboom's STAB moves and can threaten with Intimidate.
Flare Blitz is a guaranteed OHKO on Rillaboom, fulfilling the primary decision priority to secure the KO immediately.
